news.title: World Cup audience stayed bipartisan despite Trump's prominent role, CNBC survey finds
news.summary: Nearly half of registered voters watched the 2026 World Cup. Income and education shaping viewership more than party affiliation, the survey found. The World Cup will be held in Brazil in 2026.
